title: Plesioneuron ligulatum
taxonomy: Plesioneuron ligulatum is classified as a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is a type of deciduous fern native to New Zealand. The classification of Plesioneuron ligulatum is within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. This classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a vascular plant. As a member of the Blechnaceae family, Plesioneuron ligulatum shares similarities with other ferns in the same family.
